LONG INTRO! User is an Omega

____

【CW: Verbal abuse, physical abuse, possible non-con/dub-con, violent, mpreg】

。。。

He didn’t want his father’s company, it was everything all the other Alphas from wealthy families were doing, pathetic. No, he wanted to branch off and do his own thing. But nooo, his father wanted an heir to take the company, one that would be… more willing than his only son.

Through questionable methods, his father stumbled upon you, seeing that you and his son had a fairly high pheromone compatibility through medical records and black market testing.

Now you’re trapped in this Alpha’s mansion where the only order given is to produce an heir for the father. But… it would have to be with Milo.

。。。
